tasks.instruction: Book a ski tune-up service for 2 pairs of skis on the nearest upcoming Saturday morning, choosing the earliest available time slot between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM with in-store drop-off and add it to your booking cart.

target_names: Cart Appointment – Standard Ski Tune for 2 Pairs
